changes.title: BlueBubbles/reactions: fall back to `love` 当 an Agent reacts 使用 an emoji outside the iMessage tapback set (`love`/`like`/`dislike`/`laugh`/`emphasize`/`question`), so wider-vocabulary 模型 reactions like `👀` still produce a visible tapback 而不是 failing the whole reaction request. Configured ack reactions still validate strictly via the new `normalizeBlueBubblesReactionInputStrict` 路径. (#64693) Thanks @zqchris.
changes.rawTitle: BlueBubbles/reactions: fall back to `love` when an agent reacts with an emoji outside the iMessage tapback set (`love`/`like`/`dislike`/`laugh`/`emphasize`/`question`), so wider-vocabulary model reactions like `👀` still produce a visible tapback instead of failing the whole reaction request. Configured ack reactions still validate strictly via the new `normalizeBlueBubblesReactionInputStrict` path. (#64693) Thanks @zqchris.

changes.title: BlueBubbles: prefer iMessage over SMS 当 both chats exist 为了 the same 处理, honor explicit `sms:` targets, 和 never 静默地 downgrade iMessage-available recipients. (#61781) Thanks @rmartin.

items.title: Context engine/插件: 停止 rejecting third-party context engines whose `info.id` differs 从 the registered 插件 slot id. The strict-match contract added 在 2026.4.14 broke `lossless-claw` 和 other 插件 whose internal engine id does not equal the slot id they are registered under, producing repeated `info.id must match registered id` lane failures 在 every turn. 修复 #66601. (#66678) Thanks @GodsBoy.
items.rawTitle: Context engine/plugins: stop rejecting third-party context engines whose `info.id` differs from the registered plugin slot id. The strict-match contract added in 2026.4.14 broke `lossless-claw` and other plugins whose internal engine id does not equal the slot id they are registered under, producing repeated `info.id must match registered id` lane failures on every turn. Fixes #66601. (#66678) Thanks @GodsBoy.

items.title: 网关/device pairing: restrict non-admin paired-device sessions (device-令牌 认证) to their own pairing list, approve, 和 reject actions so a paired device cannot enumerate other devices 或 approve/reject pairing requests authored 通过 another device. items.rawTitle: Gateway/device pairing: restrict non-admin paired-device sessions (device-token auth) to their own pairing list, approve, and reject actions so a paired device cannot enumerate other devices or approve/reject pairing requests authored by another device. items.title: 网关/websocket broadcasts: require `operator.read` (或 higher) 为了 chat, Agent, 和 工具-result event frames so pairing-scoped 和 node-role sessions no longer passively receive session chat content, 和 scope-gate unknown broadcast events 通过 default. 插件-defined `插件.*` broadcasts are scoped to operator.write/admin, 和 status/transport events (`heartbeat`, `presence`, `tick`, etc.) remain unrestricted. Per-client sequence numbers 保留 per-connection monotonicity. (#69373) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/websocket broadcasts: require `operator.read` (or higher) for chat, agent, and tool-result event frames so pairing-scoped and node-role sessions no longer passively receive session chat content, and scope-gate unknown broadcast events by default. items.rawTitle: Gateway/startup: delay HTTP bind until websocket handlers are attached, so immediate post-startup websocket health/connect probes no longer hit the startup race window. (#43392) Thanks @dalefrieswthat.

items.title: 网关/TUI: 重试 session history while the local 网关 is still finishing startup, so `openclaw tui` reconnects no longer fail 在 transient `chat.history unavailable 期间 网关 startup` errors. (#69164) Thanks @shakkernerd.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/TUI: retry session history while the local gateway is still finishing startup, so `openclaw tui` reconnects no longer fail on transient `chat.history unavailable during gateway startup` errors. (#69164) Thanks @shakkernerd.

items.title: 网关/status: separate reachability, capability, 和 read-probe reporting so connect-only 或 scope-limited sessions no longer look fully healthy, 和 normalize SSH targets entered as `ssh user@host`. (#69215) Thanks @obviyus.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/status: separate reachability, capability, and read-probe reporting so connect-only or scope-limited sessions no longer look fully healthy, and normalize SSH targets entered as `ssh user@host`. (#69215) Thanks @obviyus.

items.title: 网关/Control 界面: surface pending scope, role, 和 device-metadata pairing approvals 在 认证 errors 和 Control 界面 hints so broader reconnects no longer look like random 认证 breakage. (#69226) Thanks @obviyus.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/Control UI: surface pending scope, role, and device-metadata pairing approvals in auth errors and Control UI hints so broader reconnects no longer look like random auth breakage. (#69226) Thanks @obviyus.

items.title: Cron: split runtime execution state 进入 `jobs-state.json` so `jobs.json` stays stable 为了 git-tracked job definitions. (#63105) Thanks @Feelw00.
items.rawTitle: Cron: split runtime execution state into `jobs-state.json` so `jobs.json` stays stable for git-tracked job definitions. (#63105) Thanks @Feelw00.

items.title: Agent/compaction: send opt-在 start 和 completion notices 期间 context compaction. (#67830) Thanks @feniix.
items.rawTitle: Agents/compaction: send opt-in start and completion notices during context compaction. (#67830) Thanks @feniix.

items.title: Agent/shell: ignore non-interactive placeholder shells like `/usr/bin/false` 和 `/sbin/nologin`, falling back to `sh` so service-user exec runs no longer exit immediately. (#69308) Thanks @sk7n4k3d.
items.rawTitle: Agents/shell: ignore non-interactive placeholder shells like `/usr/bin/false` and `/sbin/nologin`, falling back to `sh` so service-user exec runs no longer exit immediately. (#69308) Thanks @sk7n4k3d.

items.title: Agent/Pi runner: 重试 silent `stopReason=错误` turns 使用 no output 当 no side effects ran, so non-frontier providers that briefly return empty 错误 turns get another chance 而不是 ending the session early. (#68310) Thanks @Chased1k.
items.rawTitle: Agents/Pi runner: retry silent `stopReason=error` turns with no output when no side effects ran, so non-frontier providers that briefly return empty error turns get another chance instead of ending the session early. (#68310) Thanks @Chased1k.

items.title: Agent/bootstrap: budget truncation markers against per-file caps, 保留 source content 而不是 静默地 wasting bootstrap bytes, 和 避免 marker-only output 在 tiny-budget truncation cases. (#69114) Thanks @BKF-Gitty.
items.rawTitle: Agents/bootstrap: budget truncation markers against per-file caps, preserve source content instead of silently wasting bootstrap bytes, and avoid marker-only output in tiny-budget truncation cases. (#69114) Thanks @BKF-Gitty.

items.title: Agent/compaction: rename embedded Pi compaction lifecycle events to `compaction_start` / `compaction_end` so OpenClaw stays aligned 使用 `pi-coding-Agent` 0.66.1 event naming. (#67713) Thanks @mpz4life.
items.rawTitle: Agents/compaction: rename embedded Pi compaction lifecycle events to `compaction_start` / `compaction_end` so OpenClaw stays aligned with `pi-coding-agent` 0.66.1 event naming. (#67713) Thanks @mpz4life.

items.title: 安全/dotenv: block all `OPENCLAW_*` keys 从 untrusted workspace `.env` files so workspace-local env loading fails closed 为了 new runtime-control variables 而不是 静默地 inheriting them. (#473)
items.rawTitle: Security/dotenv: block all `OPENCLAW_*` keys from untrusted workspace `.env` files so workspace-local env loading fails closed for new runtime-control variables instead of silently inheriting them. (#473)

items.title: Agent/subagents: include requested role 和 runtime timing 在 subagent failure payloads so parent Agent can correlate failed 或 timed-out child work. (#68726) Thanks @BKF-Gitty.
items.rawTitle: Agents/subagents: include requested role and runtime timing on subagent failure payloads so parent agents can correlate failed or timed-out child work. (#68726) Thanks @BKF-Gitty.

items.rawTitle: Gateway/sessions: reject stale agent-scoped sessions after an agent is removed from config while preserving legacy default-agent main-session aliases. (#65986) Thanks @bittoby.

items.rawTitle: Moonshot/Kimi: default bundled Moonshot setup, web search, and media-understanding surfaces to `kimi-k2.6` while keeping `kimi-k2.5` available for compatibility. (#69477) Thanks @scoootscooob.

items.rawTitle: Webchat/images: treat inline image attachments as media for empty-turn gating while still ignoring metadata-only blank turns. (#69474) Thanks @Jaswir.

items.rawTitle: Auto-reply: apply silent `NO_REPLY` policy per conversation type, so direct chats get a helpful rewritten reply while groups and internal deliveries can remain quiet. (#68644) Thanks @Takhoffman.

items.title: 插件/tasks: 添加 a detached runtime registration contract so 插件 executors can own detached task lifecycle 和 cancellation 不适用 reaching 进入 core task internals. (#68915) Thanks @mbelinky.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/tasks: add a detached runtime registration contract so plugin executors can own detached task lifecycle and cancellation without reaching into core task internals. (#68915) Thanks @mbelinky.

items.rawTitle: Web search/plugins: resolve plugin-scoped SecretRef API keys for bundled Exa, Firecrawl, Gemini, Kimi, Perplexity, Tavily, and Grok web-search providers when they are selected through the shared web-search config. (#68424) Thanks @afurm.

items.title: 插件/内存: 保留 the active 内存 capability 当 read-only snapshot 插件 loads run, so status 和 provider discovery paths no longer wipe 内存 public artifacts. (#69219) Thanks @zeroaltitude.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/memory: preserve the active memory capability when read-only snapshot plugin loads run, so status and provider discovery paths no longer wipe memory public artifacts. (#69219) Thanks @zeroaltitude.

items.title: 插件: keep only the highest-precedence manifest 当 distinct discovered 插件 share an id, so lower-precedence global 或 workspace duplicates no longer load beside bundled 或 配置-selected 插件. (#41626) Thanks @Tortes.
items.rawTitle: Plugins: keep only the highest-precedence manifest when distinct discovered plugins share an id, so lower-precedence global or workspace duplicates no longer load beside bundled or config-selected plugins. (#41626) Thanks @Tortes.

items.title: QA/CI: make `openclaw qa suite` 和 `openclaw qa Telegram` fail 通过 default 当 scenarios fail, 添加 `--允许-failures` 为了 artifact-only runs, 和 tighten live-lane defaults 为了 CI automation. (#69122) Thanks @joshavant.
items.rawTitle: QA/CI: make `openclaw qa suite` and `openclaw qa telegram` fail by default when scenarios fail, add `--allow-failures` for artifact-only runs, and tighten live-lane defaults for CI automation. (#69122) Thanks @joshavant.

items.title: Anthropic/插件: scope Anthropic `API: "Anthropic-messages"` defaulting to Anthropic-owned providers, so `OpenAI-Codex` 和 other providers 不适用 an explicit `API` no longer get rewritten to the wrong transport. 修复 #64534.
items.rawTitle: Anthropic/plugins: scope Anthropic `api: "anthropic-messages"` defaulting to Anthropic-owned providers, so `openai-codex` and other providers without an explicit `api` no longer get rewritten to the wrong transport. Fixes #64534.

items.title: Discord/think: only show `adaptive` 在 `/think` autocomplete 为了 provider/模型 pairs that actually 支持 provider-managed adaptive thinking, so GPT/OpenAI 模型 no longer advertise an Anthropic-only 选项.
items.rawTitle: Discord/think: only show `adaptive` in `/think` autocomplete for provider/model pairs that actually support provider-managed adaptive thinking, so GPT/OpenAI models no longer advertise an Anthropic-only option.

items.title: Sessions/reset: clear auto-sourced 模型, provider, 和 认证-profile overrides 在 `/new` 和 `/reset` while preserving explicit user selections, so channel sessions 停止 staying pinned to runtime fallback choices. (#69419) Thanks @sk7n4k3d.
items.rawTitle: Sessions/reset: clear auto-sourced model, provider, and auth-profile overrides on `/new` and `/reset` while preserving explicit user selections, so channel sessions stop staying pinned to runtime fallback choices. (#69419) Thanks @sk7n4k3d.

items.title: Telegram/status reactions: honor `messages.removeAckAfterReply` 当 lifecycle status reactions are enabled, clearing 或 restoring the reaction 之后 success/错误 using the configured hold timings. (#68067) Thanks @poiskgit.
items.rawTitle: Telegram/status reactions: honor `messages.removeAckAfterReply` when lifecycle status reactions are enabled, clearing or restoring the reaction after success/error using the configured hold timings. (#68067) Thanks @poiskgit.

items.title: Telegram/polling: raise the default polling watchdog threshold 从 90s to 120s 和 添加 configurable `channels.Telegram.pollingStallThresholdMs` (also per-account) so long-running Telegram work gets more room 之前 polling is treated as stalled. (#57737) Thanks @Vitalcheffe.
items.rawTitle: Telegram/polling: raise the default polling watchdog threshold from 90s to 120s and add configurable `channels.telegram.pollingStallThresholdMs` (also per-account) so long-running Telegram work gets more room before polling is treated as stalled. (#57737) Thanks @Vitalcheffe.

items.title: Telegram/polling: bound the persisted-offset confirmation `getUpdates` probe 使用 a client-side 超时 so a zombie socket cannot hang polling recovery 之前 the runner watchdog starts. (#50368) Thanks @boticlaw.
items.rawTitle: Telegram/polling: bound the persisted-offset confirmation `getUpdates` probe with a client-side timeout so a zombie socket cannot hang polling recovery before the runner watchdog starts. (#50368) Thanks @boticlaw.

items.title: 插件/install: repair active 和 default-enabled bundled 插件 runtime dependencies 之前 import 在 packaged installs, so bundled Discord, WhatsApp, Slack, Telegram, 和 provider 插件 work 不适用 putting their dependency trees 在 core.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/install: repair active and default-enabled bundled plugin runtime dependencies before import in packaged installs, so bundled Discord, WhatsApp, Slack, Telegram, and provider plugins work without putting their dependency trees in core.

items.title: BlueBubbles: raise the outbound `/API/v1/message/text` send 超时 default 从 10s to 30s, 和 添加 a configurable `channels.bluebubbles.sendTimeoutMs` (also per-account) so macOS 26 setups where Private API iMessage sends stall 为了 60+ seconds no longer 静默地 lose messages at the 10s abort. Probes, chat lookups, 和 health checks keep the shorter 10s default. 修复 #67486. (#69193) Thanks @omarshahine.
items.rawTitle: BlueBubbles: raise the outbound `/api/v1/message/text` send timeout default from 10s to 30s, and add a configurable `channels.bluebubbles.sendTimeoutMs` (also per-account) so macOS 26 setups where Private API iMessage sends stall for 60+ seconds no longer silently lose messages at the 10s abort. Probes, chat lookups, and health checks keep the shorter 10s default. Fixes #67486. (#69193) Thanks @omarshahine.

items.title: Codex/app-server: release the session lane 当 a downstream consumer throws while draining the `turn/completed` notification, so follow-up messages 之后 a Codex 插件 reply 停止 queueing behind a stale lane lock. 修复 #67996. (#69072) Thanks @ayeshakhalid192007-dev.
items.rawTitle: Codex/app-server: release the session lane when a downstream consumer throws while draining the `turn/completed` notification, so follow-up messages after a Codex plugin reply stop queueing behind a stale lane lock. Fixes #67996. (#69072) Thanks @ayeshakhalid192007-dev.

items.title: Cron/delivery: keep isolated cron chat delivery tools available, 解决 `channel: "last"` targets 从 the 网关, show delivery previews 在 `cron list/show`, 和 避免 duplicate fallback sends 之后 direct message-工具 delivery. (#69587) Thanks @obviyus.
items.rawTitle: Cron/delivery: keep isolated cron chat delivery tools available, resolve `channel: "last"` targets from the gateway, show delivery previews in `cron list/show`, and avoid duplicate fallback sends after direct message-tool delivery. (#69587) Thanks @obviyus.

items.title: Cron/Telegram: 密钥 isolated direct-delivery dedupe to each cron execution 而不是 the reused session id, so recurring Telegram announce runs no longer report delivered while 静默地 skipping later sends. (#69000) Thanks @obviyus.
items.rawTitle: Cron/Telegram: key isolated direct-delivery dedupe to each cron execution instead of the reused session id, so recurring Telegram announce runs no longer report delivered while silently skipping later sends. (#69000) Thanks @obviyus.

items.title: Control 界面/cron: keep the runtime-only `last` delivery sentinel 从 being materialized 进入 persisted cron delivery 和 failure-alert channel configs 当 jobs are created 或 edited. (#68829) Thanks @tianhaocui.
items.rawTitle: Control UI/cron: keep the runtime-only `last` delivery sentinel from being materialized into persisted cron delivery and failure-alert channel configs when jobs are created or edited. (#68829) Thanks @tianhaocui.

items.title: Discord/slash commands: tolerate partial Discord channel metadata 在 slash-命令 和 模型-picker flows so partial channel objects no longer 崩溃 当 channel names, topics, 或 thread parent metadata are unavailable. (#68953) Thanks @dutifulbob.
items.rawTitle: Discord/slash commands: tolerate partial Discord channel metadata in slash-command and model-picker flows so partial channel objects no longer crash when channel names, topics, or thread parent metadata are unavailable. (#68953) Thanks @dutifulbob.

items.title: Cron/网关: reject ambiguous announce delivery 配置 at 添加/更新 time so invalid multi-channel 或 target-id provider settings fail early 而不是 persisting broken cron jobs. (#69015) Thanks @obviyus.
items.rawTitle: Cron/gateway: reject ambiguous announce delivery config at add/update time so invalid multi-channel or target-id provider settings fail early instead of persisting broken cron jobs. (#69015) Thanks @obviyus.

items.title: Cron/网关: ignore disabled channels 当 announce delivery ambiguity is checked, 和 validate main-session delivery patches against the live cron service default Agent so hot-reloaded Agent 配置 does not falsely reject valid updates. (#69040) Thanks @obviyus.
items.rawTitle: Cron/gateway: ignore disabled channels when announce delivery ambiguity is checked, and validate main-session delivery patches against the live cron service default agent so hot-reloaded agent config does not falsely reject valid updates. (#69040) Thanks @obviyus.

items.title: Matrix/allowlists: hot-reload `dm.allowFrom` 和 `groupAllowFrom` entries 在 inbound messages while keeping 配置 removals authoritative, so Matrix allowlist changes no longer require a channel restart to 添加 或 revoke a sender. (#68546) Thanks @johnlanni.
items.rawTitle: Matrix/allowlists: hot-reload `dm.allowFrom` and `groupAllowFrom` entries on inbound messages while keeping config removals authoritative, so Matrix allowlist changes no longer require a channel restart to add or revoke a sender. (#68546) Thanks @johnlanni.

items.title: BlueBubbles: always set `method` explicitly 在 outbound text sends (`"private-API"` 当 available, `"apple-script"` otherwise), 和 prefer Private API 在 macOS 26 even 为了 plain text. 修复 silent delivery failure 在 macOS setups 不适用 Private API where an omitted `method` let BB Server fall back to version-dependent default behavior that 静默地 drops the message (#64480), 和 the AppleScript `-1700` 错误 在 macOS 26 Tahoe plain text sends (#53159). (#69070) Thanks @xqing3.
items.rawTitle: BlueBubbles: always set `method` explicitly on outbound text sends (`"private-api"` when available, `"apple-script"` otherwise), and prefer Private API on macOS 26 even for plain text. Fixes silent delivery failure on macOS setups without Private API where an omitted `method` let BB Server fall back to version-dependent default behavior that silently drops the message (#64480), and the AppleScript `-1700` error on macOS 26 Tahoe plain text sends (#53159). (#69070) Thanks @xqing3.

items.title: Matrix/commands: recognize slash commands that are prefixed 使用 the bot's Matrix mention, so room messages like `@bot:server /new` trigger the 命令 路径 不适用 requiring custom mention regexes. (#68570) Thanks @nightq 和 @johnlanni.
items.rawTitle: Matrix/commands: recognize slash commands that are prefixed with the bot's Matrix mention, so room messages like `@bot:server /new` trigger the command path without requiring custom mention regexes. (#68570) Thanks @nightq and @johnlanni.

items.title: Cron/isolated-Agent: 保留 explicit `delivery.mode: "none"` message targets 为了 isolated runs 不适用 inheriting implicit `last` routing, so Agent-initiated Telegram sends keep their authored destination while bare `mode:none` jobs stay targetless. (#69153) Thanks @obviyus.
items.rawTitle: Cron/isolated-agent: preserve explicit `delivery.mode: "none"` message targets for isolated runs without inheriting implicit `last` routing, so agent-initiated Telegram sends keep their authored destination while bare `mode:none` jobs stay targetless. (#69153) Thanks @obviyus.

items.title: Cron/isolated-Agent: keep `delivery.mode: "none"` account-only 或 thread-only configs 从 inheriting a stale implicit recipient, so isolated runs only 解决 message routing 当 the job authored an explicit `to` target. (#69163) Thanks @obviyus.
items.rawTitle: Cron/isolated-agent: keep `delivery.mode: "none"` account-only or thread-only configs from inheriting a stale implicit recipient, so isolated runs only resolve message routing when the job authored an explicit `to` target. (#69163) Thanks @obviyus.

items.title: BlueBubbles/reactions: fall back to `love` 当 an Agent reacts 使用 an emoji outside the iMessage tapback set (`love`/`like`/`dislike`/`laugh`/`emphasize`/`question`), so wider-vocabulary 模型 reactions like `👀` still produce a visible tapback 而不是 failing the whole reaction request. Configured ack reactions still validate strictly via the new `normalizeBlueBubblesReactionInputStrict` 路径. (#64693) Thanks @zqchris.
items.rawTitle: BlueBubbles/reactions: fall back to `love` when an agent reacts with an emoji outside the iMessage tapback set (`love`/`like`/`dislike`/`laugh`/`emphasize`/`question`), so wider-vocabulary model reactions like `👀` still produce a visible tapback instead of failing the whole reaction request. Configured ack reactions still validate strictly via the new `normalizeBlueBubblesReactionInputStrict` path. (#64693) Thanks @zqchris.

items.title: BlueBubbles: prefer iMessage over SMS 当 both chats exist 为了 the same 处理, honor explicit `sms:` targets, 和 never 静默地 downgrade iMessage-available recipients. (#61781) Thanks @rmartin.
items.rawTitle: BlueBubbles: prefer iMessage over SMS when both chats exist for the same handle, honor explicit `sms:` targets, and never silently downgrade iMessage-available recipients. (#61781) Thanks @rmartin.

items.title: Telegram/setup: require numeric `allowFrom` user IDs 期间 setup 而不是 offering unsupported `@username` DM resolution, 和 point operators to `从.id`/`getUpdates` 为了 discovery. (#69191) Thanks @obviyus.
items.rawTitle: Telegram/setup: require numeric `allowFrom` user IDs during setup instead of offering unsupported `@username` DM resolution, and point operators to `from.id`/`getUpdates` for discovery. (#69191) Thanks @obviyus.

items.title: Slack: 修复 outbound replies failing 使用 "unresolved SecretRef" 为了 accounts configured via `file` 或 `exec` secret sources; the send 路径 现在 tolerates the runtime snapshot retaining an unresolved channel SecretRef 当 a boot-resolved 令牌 override is already available. (#68954) Thanks @openperf.
items.rawTitle: Slack: fix outbound replies failing with "unresolved SecretRef" for accounts configured via `file` or `exec` secret sources; the send path now tolerates the runtime snapshot retaining an unresolved channel SecretRef when a boot-resolved token override is already available. (#68954) Thanks @openperf.

items.rawTitle: Mattermost: stream thinking, tool activity, and partial reply text into a single draft preview post that finalizes in place when safe. (#47838) thanks @ninjaa.

items.rawTitle: Browser/Chrome MCP: surface `DevToolsActivePort` attach failures as browser-connectivity errors instead of a generic "waiting for tabs" timeout, and point signed-out fallbacks toward the managed `openclaw` profile.

items.rawTitle: Agents/gateway tool: extend the agent-facing `gateway` tool's config mutation guard so model-driven `config.patch` and `config.apply` cannot rewrite operator-trusted paths (sandbox, plugin trust, gateway auth/TLS, hook routing and tokens, SSRF policy, MCP servers, workspace filesystem hardening) and cannot bypass the guard by editing per-agent sandbox, tools, or embedded-Pi overrides in place under `agents.list[]`. items.rawTitle: Browser/user-profile: let existing-session `profile="user"` tool calls auto-route to a connected browser node or use explicit `target="node"`, while still honoring explicit `target="host"` pinning. (#48677)

items.rawTitle: Active Memory: degrade gracefully when memory recall fails during prompt building, logging a warning and letting the reply continue without memory context instead of failing the whole turn. (#69485) Thanks @Magicray1217.

changes.title: Agent/channels: route cross-Agent subagent spawns through the target Agent's bound channel account while preserving peer 和 workspace/role-scoped bindings, so child sessions no longer inherit the caller's account 在 shared rooms, workspaces, 或 multi-account setups. (#67508) Thanks @lukeboyett 和 @gumadeiras.

changes.title: 网关/tools: anchor trusted local `MEDIA:` 工具-result passthrough 在 the exact raw name 的 this run's registered built-在 tools, 和 reject client 工具 definitions whose names normalize-collide 使用 a built-在 或 使用 another client 工具 在 the same request (`400 invalid_request_error` 在 both JSON 和 SSE paths), so a client-supplied 工具 named like a built-在 can no longer inherit its local-media trust. (#67303)
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/tools: anchor trusted local `MEDIA:` tool-result passthrough on the exact raw name of this run's registered built-in tools, and reject client tool definitions whose names normalize-collide with a built-in or with another client tool in the same request (`400 invalid_request_error` on both JSON and SSE paths), so a client-supplied tool named like a built-in can no longer inherit its local-media trust. (#67303)

changes.title: Dreaming/内存-core: 更改 the default `dreaming.storage.mode` 从 `inline` to `separate` so Dreaming phase blocks (`## Light Sleep`, `## REM Sleep`) land 在 `内存/dreaming/{phase}/YYYY-MM-DD.md` 而不是 being injected 进入 `内存/YYYY-MM-DD.md`. Daily 内存 files no longer get dominated 通过 structured candidate output, 和 the daily-ingestion scanner that already strips dream marker blocks no longer has to compete 使用 hundreds 的 phase-block lines 在 every run. Operators who want the previous behavior can opt 在 通过 设置 `插件.entries.内存-core.配置.dreaming.storage.mode: "inline"`. (#66412) Thanks @mjamiv.
changes.rawTitle: Dreaming/memory-core: change the default `dreaming.storage.mode` from `inline` to `separate` so Dreaming phase blocks (`## Light Sleep`, `## REM Sleep`) land in `memory/dreaming/{phase}/YYYY-MM-DD.md` instead of being injected into `memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md`. Daily memory files no longer get dominated by structured candidate output, and the daily-ingestion scanner that already strips dream marker blocks no longer has to compete with hundreds of phase-block lines on every run. Operators who want the previous behavior can opt in by setting `plugins.entries.memory-core.config.dreaming.storage.mode: "inline"`. (#66412) Thanks @mjamiv.

changes.title: WhatsApp/web-session: drain the pending per-认证 creds save queue 之前 reopening sockets so reconnect-time 认证 bootstrap no longer races 在-flight `creds.json` writes 和 falsely restores 从 backup. (#67464) Thanks @neeravmakwana.
changes.rawTitle: WhatsApp/web-session: drain the pending per-auth creds save queue before reopening sockets so reconnect-time auth bootstrap no longer races in-flight `creds.json` writes and falsely restores from backup. (#67464) Thanks @neeravmakwana.

changes.title: BlueBubbles/catchup: 添加 a per-message 重试 ceiling (`catchup.maxFailureRetries`, default 10) so a persistently-failing message 使用 a malformed payload no longer wedges the catchup cursor forever. 之后 N consecutive `processMessage` failures against the same GUID, catchup logs a WARN, skips that message 在 subsequent sweeps, 和 lets the cursor advance past it. Transient failures still 重试 从 the same point as 之前. Also 修复 a lost-更新 race 在 the persistent dedupe file lock that 静默地 dropped inbound GUIDs 在 concurrent writes, a dedupe file naming migration gap 在 version upgrade, 和 a balloon-event bypass that let catchup replay debouncer-coalesced events as standalone messages. (#67426, #66870) Thanks @omarshahine.
changes.rawTitle: BlueBubbles/catchup: add a per-message retry ceiling (`catchup.maxFailureRetries`, default 10) so a persistently-failing message with a malformed payload no longer wedges the catchup cursor forever. After N consecutive `processMessage` failures against the same GUID, catchup logs a WARN, skips that message on subsequent sweeps, and lets the cursor advance past it. Transient failures still retry from the same point as before. Also fixes a lost-update race in the persistent dedupe file lock that silently dropped inbound GUIDs on concurrent writes, a dedupe file naming migration gap on version upgrade, and a balloon-event bypass that let catchup replay debouncer-coalesced events as standalone messages. (#67426, #66870) Thanks @omarshahine.

changes.rawTitle: Ollama/chat: strip the `ollama/` provider prefix from Ollama chat request model ids so configured refs like `ollama/qwen3:14b-q8_0` stop 404ing against the Ollama API. (#67457) Thanks @suboss87.

changes.title: OpenAI Codex/模型: normalize stale native transport metadata 在 both runtime resolution 和 discovery/listing so legacy `OpenAI-Codex` rows 使用 missing `API` 或 `https://chatgpt.com/backend-API/v1` self-heal to the canonical Codex transport 而不是 routing requests through broken HTML/Cloudflare paths, combining the original 修复 proposed 在 #66969 (saamuelng601-pixel) 和 #67159 (hclsys). (#67635)
changes.rawTitle: OpenAI Codex/models: normalize stale native transport metadata in both runtime resolution and discovery/listing so legacy `openai-codex` rows with missing `api` or `https://chatgpt.com/backend-api/v1` self-heal to the canonical Codex transport instead of routing requests through broken HTML/Cloudflare paths, combining the original fixes proposed in #66969 (saamuelng601-pixel) and #67159 (hclsys). (#67635)

changes.title: Agent/failover: treat HTML provider 错误 pages as upstream transport failures 为了 CDN-style 5xx responses 不适用 misclassifying embedded body text as API rate limits, while still preserving 认证 remediation 为了 HTML 401/403 pages 和 代理 remediation 为了 HTML 407 pages. (#67642) Thanks @stainlu.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/failover: treat HTML provider error pages as upstream transport failures for CDN-style 5xx responses without misclassifying embedded body text as API rate limits, while still preserving auth remediation for HTML 401/403 pages and proxy remediation for HTML 407 pages. (#67642) Thanks @stainlu.

changes.title: 网关/skills: bump the cached skills-snapshot version whenever a 配置 write touches `skills.*` (为了 example `skills.allowBundled`, `skills.entries.<id>.enabled`, 或 `skills.profile`). Existing Agent sessions persist a `skillsSnapshot` 在 `sessions.json` that reuses the skill list frozen at session creation; 不适用 this invalidation, removing a bundled skill 从 the allowlist left the old snapshot live 和 the 模型 kept calling the disabled 工具, producing `工具 <name> not found` loops that ran until the embedded-run 超时. (#67401) Thanks @xantorres.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/skills: bump the cached skills-snapshot version whenever a config write touches `skills.*` (for example `skills.allowBundled`, `skills.entries.<id>.enabled`, or `skills.profile`). Existing agent sessions persist a `skillsSnapshot` in `sessions.json` that reuses the skill list frozen at session creation; without this invalidation, removing a bundled skill from the allowlist left the old snapshot live and the model kept calling the disabled tool, producing `Tool <name> not found` loops that ran until the embedded-run timeout. (#67401) Thanks @xantorres.

changes.title: Agent/工具-loop: 启用 the unknown-工具 stream guard 通过 default. Previously `resolveUnknownToolGuardThreshold` returned `undefined` unless `tools.loopDetection.enabled` was explicitly set to `true`, which left the protection off 在 the default configuration. A hallucinated 或 removed 工具 (为了 example `himalaya` 之后 it was dropped 从 `skills.allowBundled`) would then loop "工具 X not found" attempts until the full embedded-run 超时. The guard has no false-positive surface because it only triggers 在 tools that are objectively not registered 在 the run, so it 现在 stays 在 regardless 的 `tools.loopDetection.enabled` 和 still accepts `tools.loopDetection.unknownToolThreshold` as a per-run override (default 10). (#67401) Thanks @xantorres.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/tool-loop: enable the unknown-tool stream guard by default. Previously `resolveUnknownToolGuardThreshold` returned `undefined` unless `tools.loopDetection.enabled` was explicitly set to `true`, which left the protection off in the default configuration. A hallucinated or removed tool (for example `himalaya` after it was dropped from `skills.allowBundled`) would then loop "Tool X not found" attempts until the full embedded-run timeout. The guard has no false-positive surface because it only triggers on tools that are objectively not registered in the run, so it now stays on regardless of `tools.loopDetection.enabled` and still accepts `tools.loopDetection.unknownToolThreshold` as a per-run override (default 10). (#67401) Thanks @xantorres.

changes.title: TUI/streaming: 添加 a client-side streaming watchdog to `tui-event-handlers` so the `streaming · Xm Ys` activity indicator resets to `idle` 之后 30s 的 delta silence 在 the active run. Guards against lost 或 late `state: "final"` chat events (WS reconnects, 网关 restarts, etc.) leaving the TUI stuck 在 `streaming` indefinitely; a new system log line surfaces the reset so users know to send a new message to resync. The window is configurable via the new `streamingWatchdogMs` context 选项 (set to `0` to 禁用), 和 the handler 现在 exposes a `dispose()` that clears the pending timer 在 shutdown. (#67401) Thanks @xantorres.
changes.rawTitle: TUI/streaming: add a client-side streaming watchdog to `tui-event-handlers` so the `streaming · Xm Ys` activity indicator resets to `idle` after 30s of delta silence on the active run. Guards against lost or late `state: "final"` chat events (WS reconnects, gateway restarts, etc.) leaving the TUI stuck on `streaming` indefinitely; a new system log line surfaces the reset so users know to send a new message to resync. The window is configurable via the new `streamingWatchdogMs` context option (set to `0` to disable), and the handler now exposes a `dispose()` that clears the pending timer on shutdown. (#67401) Thanks @xantorres.

changes.title: Extensions/lmstudio: 添加 exponential backoff to the inference-preload wrapper so an LM Studio 模型-load failure (为了 example the built-在 内存 guardrail rejecting a load because the swap is saturated) no longer produces a WARN line every ~2s 为了 every chat request. The wrapper 现在 records consecutive preload failures per `(baseUrl, modelKey, contextLength)` tuple 使用 a 5s → 10s → 20s → … → 5min cooldown 和 skips the preload step entirely while a cooldown is active, letting chat requests proceed directly to the stream (the 模型 is often already loaded via the LM Studio 界面). The combined `preload failed` log line 现在 reports consecutive-failure count 和 remaining cooldown so operators can act 在 the real issue 而不是 drowning 在 repeated warnings. (#67401) Thanks @xantorres.
changes.rawTitle: Extensions/lmstudio: add exponential backoff to the inference-preload wrapper so an LM Studio model-load failure (for example the built-in memory guardrail rejecting a load because the swap is saturated) no longer produces a WARN line every ~2s for every chat request. The wrapper now records consecutive preload failures per `(baseUrl, modelKey, contextLength)` tuple with a 5s → 10s → 20s → … → 5min cooldown and skips the preload step entirely while a cooldown is active, letting chat requests proceed directly to the stream (the model is often already loaded via the LM Studio UI). The combined `preload failed` log line now reports consecutive-failure count and remaining cooldown so operators can act on the real issue instead of drowning in repeated warnings. (#67401) Thanks @xantorres.

changes.title: Agent/replay: re-run 工具/result pairing 之后 strict replay 工具-call ID sanitization 在 outbound requests so Anthropic-compatible providers like MiniMax no longer receive malformed orphan 工具-result IDs such as `...toolresult1` 期间 compaction 和 重试 flows. (#67620) Thanks @stainlu.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/replay: re-run tool/result pairing after strict replay tool-call ID sanitization on outbound requests so Anthropic-compatible providers like MiniMax no longer receive malformed orphan tool-result IDs such as `...toolresult1` during compaction and retry flows. changes.title: 网关/startup: 修复 spurious SIGUSR1 restart loop 在 Linux/systemd 当 插件 auto-启用 is the only startup 配置 write; the 配置 hash guard was not captured 为了 that write 路径, causing chokidar to treat each boot write as an external 更改 和 trigger a reload → restart cycle that corrupts manifest.db 之后 repeated cycles. 修复 #67436. (#67557) thanks @openperf
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/startup: fix spurious SIGUSR1 restart loop on Linux/systemd when plugin auto-enable is the only startup config write; the config hash guard was not captured for that write path, causing chokidar to treat each boot write as an external change and trigger a reload → restart cycle that corrupts manifest.db after repeated cycles. Fixes #67436. (#67557) thanks @openperf

changes.title: 飞书/Webhook: harden the Webhook transport 和 card-action replay guards to fail closed 在 missing `encryptKey` 和 blank callback tokens — refuse to start the Webhook transport 不适用 an `encryptKey`, reject unsigned requests 当 no 密钥 is present 而不是 accepting them, 和 drop blank card-action tokens 之前 the dedupe claim 和 dispatcher. Defense-在-depth over the already-closed monitor-account layer. (#66707) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

Defense-in-depth over the already-closed monitor-account layer. (#66707) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

changes.title: Agent/workspace files: route `Agent.files.get`, `Agent.files.set`, 和 workspace listing through the shared `fs-safe` helpers (`openFileWithinRoot`/`readFileWithinRoot`/`writeFileWithinRoot`), reject symlink aliases 为了 allowlisted Agent files, 和 have `fs-safe` 解决 opened-file real paths 从 the file descriptor 之前 falling back to 路径-based `realpath` so a symlink swap 之间 `open` 和 `realpath` can no longer redirect the validated 路径 off the intended inode. (#66636) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/workspace files: route `agents.files.get`, `agents.files.set`, and workspace listing through the shared `fs-safe` helpers (`openFileWithinRoot`/`readFileWithinRoot`/`writeFileWithinRoot`), reject symlink aliases for allowlisted agent files, and have `fs-safe` resolve opened-file real paths from the file descriptor before falling back to path-based `realpath` so a symlink swap between `open` and `realpath` can no longer redirect the validated path off the intended inode. (#66636) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

changes.title: 网关/MCP协议 loopback: switch the `/MCP协议` bearer comparison 从 plain `!==` to constant-time `safeEqualSecret` (matching the convention every other 认证 surface 在 the codebase uses), 和 reject non-loopback 浏览器-origin requests via `checkBrowserOrigin` 之前 the 认证 gate runs. Loopback origins (`127.0.0.1:*`, `localhost:*`, same-origin) still go through, including the `localhost`↔`127.0.0.1` host mismatch that browsers flag as `Sec-Fetch-Site: cross-site`. (#66665) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/MCP loopback: switch the `/mcp` bearer comparison from plain `!==` to constant-time `safeEqualSecret` (matching the convention every other auth surface in the codebase uses), and reject non-loopback browser-origin requests via `checkBrowserOrigin` before the auth gate runs. Loopback origins (`127.0.0.1:*`, `localhost:*`, same-origin) still go through, including the `localhost`↔`127.0.0.1` host mismatch that browsers flag as `Sec-Fetch-Site: cross-site`. (#66665) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

changes.rawTitle: WhatsApp/Baileys media upload: harden encrypted upload handling so large outbound media sends avoid buffer spikes and reliability regressions. (#65966) Thanks @frankekn.

changes.title: QQBot/cron: guard against undefined `event.content` 在 `parseFaceTags` 和 `filterInternalMarkers` so cron-triggered Agent turns 使用 no content payload no longer 崩溃 使用 `TypeError: Cannot read properties 的 undefined (reading 'startsWith')`. (#66302) Thanks @xinmotlanthua.

changes.title: CLI/插件: 停止 `--dangerously-force-unsafe-install` 插件 installs 从 falling back to hook-pack installs 之后 安全 scan failures, while still preserving non-安全 fallback behavior 为了 real hook packs. (#58909) Thanks @hxy91819.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/plugins: stop `--dangerously-force-unsafe-install` plugin installs from falling back to hook-pack installs after security scan failures, while still preserving non-security fallback behavior for real hook packs. (#58909) Thanks @hxy91819.

changes.title: Claude CLI/sessions: classify `No conversation found 使用 session ID` as `session_expired` so expired CLI-backed conversations clear the stale binding 和 recover 在 the next turn. (#65028) thanks @Ivan-Fn.
changes.rawTitle: Claude CLI/sessions: classify `No conversation found with session ID` as `session_expired` so expired CLI-backed conversations clear the stale binding and recover on the next turn. (#65028) thanks @Ivan-Fn.

changes.title: Context Engine: gracefully fall back to the legacy engine 当 a third-party context engine 插件 fails at resolution time (unregistered id, factory throw, 或 contract violation), preventing a full 网关 outage 在 every channel. (#66930) Thanks @openperf.
changes.rawTitle: Context Engine: gracefully fall back to the legacy engine when a third-party context engine plugin fails at resolution time (unregistered id, factory throw, or contract violation), preventing a full gateway outage on every channel. (#66930) Thanks @openperf.

changes.title: Control 界面/chat: keep optimistic user message cards visible 期间 active sends 通过 deferring same-session history reloads until the active run ends, including aborted 和 errored runs. (#66997) Thanks @scotthuang 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/chat: keep optimistic user message cards visible during active sends by deferring same-session history reloads until the active run ends, including aborted and errored runs. (#66997) Thanks @scotthuang and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Media/Slack: 允许 host-local CSV 和 Markdown uploads only 当 the fallback buffer actually decodes as text, so real plain-text files work 不适用 letting opaque non-text blobs renamed to `.csv` 或 `.md` slip past the host-read guard. (#67047) Thanks @Unayung.
changes.rawTitle: Media/Slack: allow host-local CSV and Markdown uploads only when the fallback buffer actually decodes as text, so real plain-text files work without letting opaque non-text blobs renamed to `.csv` or `.md` slip past the host-read guard. (#67047) Thanks @Unayung.

changes.title: Ollama/onboarding: split setup 进入 `Cloud + Local`, `Cloud only`, 和 `Local only`, 支持 direct `OLLAMA_API_KEY` cloud setup 不适用 a local daemon, 和 keep Ollama web search 在 the local-host 路径. (#67005) Thanks @obviyus.
changes.rawTitle: Ollama/onboarding: split setup into `Cloud + Local`, `Cloud only`, and `Local only`, support direct `OLLAMA_API_KEY` cloud setup without a local daemon, and keep Ollama web search on the local-host path. (#67005) Thanks @obviyus.

changes.title: Webchat/安全: reject remote-host `file://` URLs 在 the media embedding 路径. (#67293) Thanks @pgondhi987.
changes.rawTitle: Webchat/security: reject remote-host `file://` URLs in the media embedding path. (#67293) Thanks @pgondhi987.

changes.title: Dreaming/内存-core: use the ingestion day, not the source file day, 为了 daily recall dedupe so repeat sweeps 的 the same daily note can increment `dailyCount` across days 而不是 stalling at `1`. (#67091) Thanks @Bartok9.
changes.rawTitle: Dreaming/memory-core: use the ingestion day, not the source file day, for daily recall dedupe so repeat sweeps of the same daily note can increment `dailyCount` across days instead of stalling at `1`. (#67091) Thanks @Bartok9.

changes.title: Node-host/tools.exec: let approval binding distinguish known native binaries 从 mutable shell payload files, while still fail-closing unknown 或 racy file probes so absolute-路径 node-host commands like `/usr/bin/whoami` no longer get rejected as unsafe interpreter/runtime commands. (#66731) Thanks @tmimmanuel.
changes.rawTitle: Node-host/tools.exec: let approval binding distinguish known native binaries from mutable shell payload files, while still fail-closing unknown or racy file probes so absolute-path node-host commands like `/usr/bin/whoami` no longer get rejected as unsafe interpreter/runtime commands. (#66731) Thanks @tmimmanuel.

items.title: Control 界面/Overview: 添加 a 模型 认证 status card showing OAuth认证 令牌 health 和 provider rate-limit pressure at a glance, 使用 attention callouts 当 OAuth认证 tokens are expiring 或 expired. Backed 通过 a new `模型.authStatus` 网关 method that strips credentials 和 caches 为了 60s. (#66211) Thanks @omarshahine.
items.rawTitle: Control UI/Overview: add a Model Auth status card showing OAuth token health and provider rate-limit pressure at a glance, with attention callouts when OAuth tokens are expiring or expired. Backed by a new `models.authStatus` gateway method that strips credentials and caches for 60s. (#66211) Thanks @omarshahine.

items.rawTitle: Control UI/Overview: fix false-positive "missing" alerts on the Model Auth status card for aliased providers, env-backed OAuth with auth.profiles, and unresolvable env SecretRefs. (#67253) Thanks @omarshahine.

items.title: Ollama/chat: strip the `ollama/` provider prefix 从 Ollama chat request 模型 ids so configured refs like `ollama/qwen3:14b-q8_0` 停止 404ing against the Ollama API. (#67457) Thanks @suboss87.
items.rawTitle: Ollama/chat: strip the `ollama/` provider prefix from Ollama chat request model ids so configured refs like `ollama/qwen3:14b-q8_0` stop 404ing against the Ollama API. (#67457) Thanks @suboss87.

items.title: OpenAI Codex/模型: normalize stale native transport metadata 在 both runtime resolution 和 discovery/listing so legacy `OpenAI-Codex` rows 使用 missing `API` 或 `https://chatgpt.com/backend-API/v1` self-heal to the canonical Codex transport 而不是 routing requests through broken HTML/Cloudflare paths, combining the original 修复 proposed 在 #66969 (saamuelng601-pixel) 和 #67159 (hclsys). (#67635)
items.rawTitle: OpenAI Codex/models: normalize stale native transport metadata in both runtime resolution and discovery/listing so legacy `openai-codex` rows with missing `api` or `https://chatgpt.com/backend-api/v1` self-heal to the canonical Codex transport instead of routing requests through broken HTML/Cloudflare paths, combining the original fixes proposed in #66969 (saamuelng601-pixel) and #67159 (hclsys). (#67635)

items.title: Extensions/lmstudio: 添加 exponential backoff to the inference-preload wrapper so an LM Studio 模型-load failure (为了 example the built-在 内存 guardrail rejecting a load because the swap is saturated) no longer produces a WARN line every ~2s 为了 every chat request. The wrapper 现在 records consecutive preload failures per `(baseUrl, modelKey, contextLength)` tuple 使用 a 5s → 10s → 20s → … → 5min cooldown 和 skips the preload step entirely while a cooldown is active, letting chat requests proceed directly to the stream (the 模型 is often already loaded via the LM Studio 界面). The combined `preload failed` log line 现在 reports consecutive-failure count 和 remaining cooldown so operators can act 在 the real issue 而不是 drowning 在 repeated warnings. (#67401) Thanks @xantorres.
items.rawTitle: Extensions/lmstudio: add exponential backoff to the inference-preload wrapper so an LM Studio model-load failure (for example the built-in memory guardrail rejecting a load because the swap is saturated) no longer produces a WARN line every ~2s for every chat request. The wrapper now records consecutive preload failures per `(baseUrl, modelKey, contextLength)` tuple with a 5s → 10s → 20s → … → 5min cooldown and skips the preload step entirely while a cooldown is active, letting chat requests proceed directly to the stream (the model is often already loaded via the LM Studio UI). The combined `preload failed` log line now reports consecutive-failure count and remaining cooldown so operators can act on the real issue instead of drowning in repeated warnings. (#67401) Thanks @xantorres.

items.title: Agent/replay: re-run 工具/result pairing 之后 strict replay 工具-call ID sanitization 在 outbound requests so Anthropic-compatible providers like MiniMax no longer receive malformed orphan 工具-result IDs such as `...toolresult1` 期间 compaction 和 重试 flows. (#67620) Thanks @stainlu.
items.rawTitle: Agents/replay: re-run tool/result pairing after strict replay tool-call ID sanitization on outbound requests so Anthropic-compatible providers like MiniMax no longer receive malformed orphan tool-result IDs such as `...toolresult1` during compaction and retry flows. (#67620) Thanks @stainlu.

items.title: Codex/app-server: parse Desktop-originated app-server user Agent such as `Codex Desktop/0.118.0`, keeping the version gate working 当 the Codex CLI inherits a multi-word originator. (#64666) Thanks @cyrusaf.
items.rawTitle: Codex/app-server: parse Desktop-originated app-server user agents such as `Codex Desktop/0.118.0`, keeping the version gate working when the Codex CLI inherits a multi-word originator. (#64666) Thanks @cyrusaf.

items.title: Agent/OpenAI Responses: 添加 `模型.providers.*.模型.*.compat.supportsPromptCacheKey` so OpenAI-compatible proxies that forward `prompt_cache_key` can keep prompt caching enabled while incompatible endpoints can still force stripping. (#67427) Thanks @damselem.
items.rawTitle: Agents/OpenAI Responses: add `models.providers.*.models.*.compat.supportsPromptCacheKey` so OpenAI-compatible proxies that forward `prompt_cache_key` can keep prompt caching enabled while incompatible endpoints can still force stripping. (#67427) Thanks @damselem.

items.title: Agent/compaction: cap the compaction reserve-令牌 floor to the 模型 context window so small-context local 模型 (e.g. Ollama 使用 16K tokens) no longer trigger context-overflow errors 或 infinite compaction loops 在 every prompt. (#65671) Thanks @openperf.
items.rawTitle: Agents/compaction: cap the compaction reserve-token floor to the model context window so small-context local models (e.g. Ollama with 16K tokens) no longer trigger context-overflow errors or infinite compaction loops on every prompt. (#65671) Thanks @openperf.

items.title: Agent/OpenAI Responses: classify the exact `Unknown 错误 (no 错误 details 在 response)` transport failure as failover reason `unknown` so assistant/模型 fallback still runs 为了 that no-details failure 路径. (#65254) Thanks @OpenCodeEngineer.
items.rawTitle: Agents/OpenAI Responses: classify the exact `Unknown error (no error details in response)` transport failure as failover reason `unknown` so assistant/model fallback still runs for that no-details failure path. (#65254) Thanks @OpenCodeEngineer.

items.rawTitle: Models/probe: surface invalid-model probe failures as `format` instead of `unknown` in `models list --probe`, and lock the invalid-model fallback path in with regression coverage. (#50028) Thanks @xiwuqi.

items.rawTitle: Agents/failover: classify OpenAI-compatible `finish_reason: network_error` stream failures as timeout so model fallback retries continue instead of stopping with an unknown failover reason. (#61784) thanks @lawrence3699.

items.rawTitle: Agents/context engines: preserve prompt-only token counts, not full request totals, when deferred maintenance reuses after-turn runtime context so background compaction bookkeeping matches the active prompt window. (#66820) thanks @jalehman.

items.rawTitle: OpenRouter/Qwen3: parse `reasoning_details` stream deltas as thinking content without skipping same-chunk tool calls, so Qwen3 replies no longer fail empty on OpenRouter and mixed reasoning/tool-call chunks still execute normally. (#66905) Thanks @bladin.

items.title: Packaging/插件: localize bundled 插件 runtime deps to their owning extensions, trim the published docs payload, 和 tighten install/package-manager guardrails so published builds stay leaner 和 core stops carrying extension-owned runtime baggage. (#67099) Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Packaging/plugins: localize bundled plugin runtime deps to their owning extensions, trim the published docs payload, and tighten install/package-manager guardrails so published builds stay leaner and core stops carrying extension-owned runtime baggage. (#67099) Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: Dreaming/内存-core: 更改 the default `dreaming.storage.mode` 从 `inline` to `separate` so Dreaming phase blocks (`## Light Sleep`, `## REM Sleep`) land 在 `内存/dreaming/{phase}/YYYY-MM-DD.md` 而不是 being injected 进入 `内存/YYYY-MM-DD.md`. Daily 内存 files no longer get dominated 通过 structured candidate output, 和 the daily-ingestion scanner that already strips dream marker blocks no longer has to compete 使用 hundreds 的 phase-block lines 在 every run. Operators who want the previous behavior can opt 在 通过 设置 `插件.entries.内存-core.配置.dreaming.storage.mode: "inline"`. (#66412) Thanks @mjamiv.
items.rawTitle: Dreaming/memory-core: change the default `dreaming.storage.mode` from `inline` to `separate` so Dreaming phase blocks (`## Light Sleep`, `## REM Sleep`) land in `memory/dreaming/{phase}/YYYY-MM-DD.md` instead of being injected into `memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md`. Daily memory files no longer get dominated by structured candidate output, and the daily-ingestion scanner that already strips dream marker blocks no longer has to compete with hundreds of phase-block lines on every run. Operators who want the previous behavior can opt in by setting `plugins.entries.memory-core.config.dreaming.storage.mode: "inline"`. (#66412) Thanks @mjamiv.

items.title: 网关/startup: 修复 spurious SIGUSR1 restart loop 在 Linux/systemd 当 插件 auto-启用 is the only startup 配置 write; the 配置 hash guard was not captured 为了 that write 路径, causing chokidar to treat each boot write as an external 更改 和 trigger a reload → restart cycle that corrupts manifest.db 之后 repeated cycles. 修复 #67436. (#67557) thanks @openperf
items.rawTitle: Gateway/startup: fix spurious SIGUSR1 restart loop on Linux/systemd when plugin auto-enable is the only startup config write; the config hash guard was not captured for that write path, causing chokidar to treat each boot write as an external change and trigger a reload → restart cycle that corrupts manifest.db after repeated cycles. Fixes #67436. (#67557) thanks @openperf

items.title: Codex/harness: auto-启用 the Codex 插件 当 `Codex` is selected as an embedded Agent harness runtime, including forced default, per-Agent, 和 `OPENCLAW_AGENT_RUNTIME` paths. (#67474) Thanks @duqaXxX.
items.rawTitle: Codex/harness: auto-enable the Codex plugin when `codex` is selected as an embedded agent harness runtime, including forced default, per-agent, and `OPENCLAW_AGENT_RUNTIME` paths. (#67474) Thanks @duqaXxX.

items.title: Setup/providers: guard preferred-provider lookup 期间 setup so malformed 插件 metadata 使用 a missing provider id no longer crashes the wizard 使用 `Cannot read properties 的 undefined (reading 'trim')`. (#66649) Thanks @Tianworld.
items.rawTitle: Setup/providers: guard preferred-provider lookup during setup so malformed plugin metadata with a missing provider id no longer crashes the wizard with `Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'trim')`. (#66649) Thanks @Tianworld.

items.title: 网关/认证: 解决 the active 网关 bearer per-request 在 the HTTP server 和 the HTTP upgrade handler via `getResolvedAuth()`, mirroring the WebSocket 路径, so a secret rotated through `secrets.reload` 或 配置 hot-reload stops authenticating 在 `/v1/*`, `/tools/invoke`, 插件 HTTP routes, 和 the canvas upgrade 路径 immediately 而不是 remaining valid 在 HTTP until 网关 restart. (#66651) Thanks @mmaps.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/auth: resolve the active gateway bearer per-request on the HTTP server and the HTTP upgrade handler via `getResolvedAuth()`, mirroring the WebSocket path, so a secret rotated through `secrets.reload` or config hot-reload stops authenticating on `/v1/*`, `/tools/invoke`, plugin HTTP routes, and the canvas upgrade path immediately instead of remaining valid on HTTP until gateway restart. (#66651) Thanks @mmaps.

items.title: Secrets/插件/status: align SecretRef inspect-vs-strict handling across 插件 preload, read-only status/Agent surfaces, 和 runtime 认证 paths so unresolved refs no longer 崩溃 read-only CLI flows while runtime-required non-env refs stay strict. (#66818) Thanks @joshavant.
items.rawTitle: Secrets/plugins/status: align SecretRef inspect-vs-strict handling across plugin preload, read-only status/agents surfaces, and runtime auth paths so unresolved refs no longer crash read-only CLI flows while runtime-required non-env refs stay strict. (#66818) Thanks @joshavant.

items.title: CLI/插件: 停止 `--dangerously-force-unsafe-install` 插件 installs 从 falling back to hook-pack installs 之后 安全 scan failures, while still preserving non-安全 fallback behavior 为了 real hook packs. (#58909) Thanks @hxy91819.
items.rawTitle: CLI/plugins: stop `--dangerously-force-unsafe-install` plugin installs from falling back to hook-pack installs after security scan failures, while still preserving non-security fallback behavior for real hook packs. (#58909) Thanks @hxy91819.

items.title: 内存/LanceDB: 添加 cloud storage 支持 to `内存-lancedb` so durable 内存 indexes can run 在 remote object storage 而不是 local disk only. (#63502) Thanks @rugvedS07.
items.rawTitle: Memory/LanceDB: add cloud storage support to `memory-lancedb` so durable memory indexes can run on remote object storage instead of local disk only. (#63502) Thanks @rugvedS07.

items.title: 内存-core/dreaming: skip dreaming narrative transcripts 从 session-store metadata 之前 bootstrap records land so dream diary prompt/prose lines do not pollute session ingestion. (#67315) thanks @jalehman.
items.rawTitle: Memory-core/dreaming: skip dreaming narrative transcripts from session-store metadata before bootstrap records land so dream diary prompt/prose lines do not pollute session ingestion. (#67315) thanks @jalehman.

items.title: Cron/announce delivery: keep isolated announce `NO_REPLY` stripping case-insensitive across direct 和 text delivery, 保留 structured media-only sends 当 a caption strips silent, 和 derive main-session awareness 从 the cleaned payloads so silent captions no longer leak stale `NO_REPLY` text. (#65016) Thanks @BKF-Gitty.
items.rawTitle: Cron/announce delivery: keep isolated announce `NO_REPLY` stripping case-insensitive across direct and text delivery, preserve structured media-only sends when a caption strips silent, and derive main-session awareness from the cleaned payloads so silent captions no longer leak stale `NO_REPLY` text. (#65016) Thanks @BKF-Gitty.

items.title: 内存-core/QMD `memory_get`: reject reads 的 arbitrary workspace markdown paths 和 only 允许 canonical 内存 files (`内存.md`, `内存.md`, `DREAMS.md`, `dreams.md`, `内存/**`) plus exact paths 的 active indexed QMD workspace documents, so the QMD 内存 backend can no longer be used as a generic workspace-file read shim that bypasses `read` 工具-policy denials. (#66026) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
items.rawTitle: Memory-core/QMD `memory_get`: reject reads of arbitrary workspace markdown paths and only allow canonical memory files (`MEMORY.md`, `memory.md`, `DREAMS.md`, `dreams.md`, `memory/**`) plus exact paths of active indexed QMD workspace documents, so the QMD memory backend can no longer be used as a generic workspace-file read shim that bypasses `read` tool-policy denials. (#66026) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

items.title: GitHub Copilot/内存 search: 添加 a GitHub Copilot embedding provider 为了 内存 search, 和 expose a dedicated Copilot embedding host helper so 插件 can 复用 the transport while honoring remote overrides, 令牌 refresh, 和 safer payload validation. (#61718) Thanks @feiskyer 和 @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: GitHub Copilot/memory search: add a GitHub Copilot embedding provider for memory search, and expose a dedicated Copilot embedding host helper so plugins can reuse the transport while honoring remote overrides, token refresh, and safer payload validation. (#61718) Thanks @feiskyer and @vincentkoc.

items.title: Packaging/插件: prune common test/spec cargo 从 bundled 插件 runtime dependencies 和 fail npm release validation if packaged test cargo reappears, keeping published tarballs leaner 不适用 插件-specific special cases. (#67275) thanks @gumadeiras.
items.rawTitle: Packaging/plugins: prune common test/spec cargo from bundled plugin runtime dependencies and fail npm release validation if packaged test cargo reappears, keeping published tarballs leaner without plugin-specific special cases. (#67275) thanks @gumadeiras.

items.title: Agent/context + 内存: trim default startup/skills prompt budgets, cap `memory_get` excerpts 通过 default 使用 explicit continuation metadata, 和 keep QMD reads aligned 使用 the same bounded excerpt contract so long sessions pull less context 通过 default 不适用 losing deterministic follow-up reads.
items.rawTitle: Agents/context + Memory: trim default startup/skills prompt budgets, cap `memory_get` excerpts by default with explicit continuation metadata, and keep QMD reads aligned with the same bounded excerpt contract so long sessions pull less context by default without losing deterministic follow-up reads.

items.title: Speech/TTS: auto-启用 the bundled Microsoft 和 ElevenLabs speech providers, 和 route generic TTS directive tokens through the explicit 或 active provider first so overrides like `[[tts:speed=1.2]]` 停止 静默地 landing 在 the wrong provider. (#62846) Thanks @stainlu.
items.rawTitle: Speech/TTS: auto-enable the bundled Microsoft and ElevenLabs speech providers, and route generic TTS directive tokens through the explicit or active provider first so overrides like `[[tts:speed=1.2]]` stop silently landing on the wrong provider. (#62846) Thanks @stainlu.

items.title: 网关/skills: bump the cached skills-snapshot version whenever a 配置 write touches `skills.*` (为了 example `skills.allowBundled`, `skills.entries.<id>.enabled`, 或 `skills.profile`). Existing Agent sessions persist a `skillsSnapshot` 在 `sessions.json` that reuses the skill list frozen at session creation; 不适用 this invalidation, removing a bundled skill 从 the allowlist left the old snapshot live 和 the 模型 kept calling the disabled 工具, producing `工具 <name> not found` loops that ran until the embedded-run 超时. (#67401) Thanks @xantorres.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/skills: bump the cached skills-snapshot version whenever a config write touches `skills.*` (for example `skills.allowBundled`, `skills.entries.<id>.enabled`, or `skills.profile`). Existing agent sessions persist a `skillsSnapshot` in `sessions.json` that reuses the skill list frozen at session creation; without this invalidation, removing a bundled skill from the allowlist left the old snapshot live and the model kept calling the disabled tool, producing `Tool <name> not found` loops that ran until the embedded-run timeout. (#67401) Thanks @xantorres.

items.title: Agent/工具-loop: 启用 the unknown-工具 stream guard 通过 default. Previously `resolveUnknownToolGuardThreshold` returned `undefined` unless `tools.loopDetection.enabled` was explicitly set to `true`, which left the protection off 在 the default configuration. A hallucinated 或 removed 工具 (为了 example `himalaya` 之后 it was dropped 从 `skills.allowBundled`) would then loop "工具 X not found" attempts until the full embedded-run 超时. The guard has no false-positive surface because it only triggers 在 tools that are objectively not registered 在 the run, so it 现在 stays 在 regardless 的 `tools.loopDetection.enabled` 和 still accepts `tools.loopDetection.unknownToolThreshold` as a per-run override (default 10). (#67401) Thanks @xantorres.
items.rawTitle: Agents/tool-loop: enable the unknown-tool stream guard by default. Previously `resolveUnknownToolGuardThreshold` returned `undefined` unless `tools.loopDetection.enabled` was explicitly set to `true`, which left the protection off in the default configuration. A hallucinated or removed tool (for example `himalaya` after it was dropped from `skills.allowBundled`) would then loop "Tool X not found" attempts until the full embedded-run timeout. The guard has no false-positive surface because it only triggers on tools that are objectively not registered in the run, so it now stays on regardless of `tools.loopDetection.enabled` and still accepts `tools.loopDetection.unknownToolThreshold` as a per-run override (default 10). (#67401) Thanks @xantorres.

items.title: OpenAI Codex/CLI: keep resumed `Codex exec resume` runs 在 the safe non-interactive 路径 不适用 reintroducing the removed dangerous bypass flag 通过 passing the supported `--skip-git-repo-check` resume arg plus Codex's native `sandbox_mode="workspace-write"` 配置 override. (#67666) Thanks @plgonzalezrx8.

items.title: 网关/MCP协议 loopback: switch the `/MCP协议` bearer comparison 从 plain `!==` to constant-time `safeEqualSecret` (matching the convention every other 认证 surface 在 the codebase uses), 和 reject non-loopback 浏览器-origin requests via `checkBrowserOrigin` 之前 the 认证 gate runs. Loopback origins (`127.0.0.1:*`, `localhost:*`, same-origin) still go through, including the `localhost`↔`127.0.0.1` host mismatch that browsers flag as `Sec-Fetch-Site: cross-site`. (#66665) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/MCP loopback: switch the `/mcp` bearer comparison from plain `!==` to constant-time `safeEqualSecret` (matching the convention every other auth surface in the codebase uses), and reject non-loopback browser-origin requests via `checkBrowserOrigin` before the auth gate runs. Loopback origins (`127.0.0.1:*`, `localhost:*`, same-origin) still go through, including the `localhost`↔`127.0.0.1` host mismatch that browsers flag as `Sec-Fetch-Site: cross-site`. (#66665) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

items.title: BlueBubbles/catchup: 添加 a per-message 重试 ceiling (`catchup.maxFailureRetries`, default 10) so a persistently-failing message 使用 a malformed payload no longer wedges the catchup cursor forever. 之后 N consecutive `processMessage` failures against the same GUID, catchup logs a WARN, skips that message 在 subsequent sweeps, 和 lets the cursor advance past it. Transient failures still 重试 从 the same point as 之前. Also 修复 a lost-更新 race 在 the persistent dedupe file lock that 静默地 dropped inbound GUIDs 在 concurrent writes, a dedupe file naming migration gap 在 version upgrade, 和 a balloon-event bypass that let catchup replay debouncer-coalesced events as standalone messages. (#67426, #66870) Thanks @omarshahine.
items.rawTitle: BlueBubbles/catchup: add a per-message retry ceiling (`catchup.maxFailureRetries`, default 10) so a persistently-failing message with a malformed payload no longer wedges the catchup cursor forever. After N consecutive `processMessage` failures against the same GUID, catchup logs a WARN, skips that message on subsequent sweeps, and lets the cursor advance past it. Transient failures still retry from the same point as before. Also fixes a lost-update race in the persistent dedupe file lock that silently dropped inbound GUIDs on concurrent writes, a dedupe file naming migration gap on version upgrade, and a balloon-event bypass that let catchup replay debouncer-coalesced events as standalone messages. (#67426, #66870) Thanks @omarshahine.

items.title: TUI/streaming: 添加 a client-side streaming watchdog to `tui-event-handlers` so the `streaming · Xm Ys` activity indicator resets to `idle` 之后 30s 的 delta silence 在 the active run. Guards against lost 或 late `state: "final"` chat events (WS reconnects, 网关 restarts, etc.) leaving the TUI stuck 在 `streaming` indefinitely; a new system log line surfaces the reset so users know to send a new message to resync. The window is configurable via the new `streamingWatchdogMs` context 选项 (set to `0` to 禁用), 和 the handler 现在 exposes a `dispose()` that clears the pending timer 在 shutdown. (#67401) Thanks @xantorres.
items.rawTitle: TUI/streaming: add a client-side streaming watchdog to `tui-event-handlers` so the `streaming · Xm Ys` activity indicator resets to `idle` after 30s of delta silence on the active run. Guards against lost or late `state: "final"` chat events (WS reconnects, gateway restarts, etc.) leaving the TUI stuck on `streaming` indefinitely; a new system log line surfaces the reset so users know to send a new message to resync. The window is configurable via the new `streamingWatchdogMs` context option (set to `0` to disable), and the handler now exposes a `dispose()` that clears the pending timer on shutdown. (#67401) Thanks @xantorres.

Uses the existing `processMessage` 路径 和 is deduped 通过 #66816's inbound GUID cache. (#66857, #66721) Thanks @omarshahine.
items.rawTitle: BlueBubbles/catchup: replay missed webhook messages after gateway restart via a persistent per-account cursor and `/api/v1/message/query?after=<ts>` pass, so messages delivered while the gateway was down no longer disappear. Uses the existing `processMessage` path and is deduped by #66816's inbound GUID cache. (#66857, #66721) Thanks @omarshahine.

items.title: Telegram/native commands: keep Telegram 命令-sync cache process-local so 网关 restarts re-register the menu 而不是 trusting stale 在-disk sync state 之后 Telegram cleared commands out-的-band. (#66730) Thanks @nightq.
items.rawTitle: Telegram/native commands: keep Telegram command-sync cache process-local so gateway restarts re-register the menu instead of trusting stale on-disk sync state after Telegram cleared commands out-of-band. (#66730) Thanks @nightq.

items.title: WhatsApp/Baileys media upload: harden encrypted upload handling so large outbound media sends 避免 buffer spikes 和 reliability regressions. (#65966) Thanks @frankekn.
items.rawTitle: WhatsApp/Baileys media upload: harden encrypted upload handling so large outbound media sends avoid buffer spikes and reliability regressions. (#65966) Thanks @frankekn.

items.title: Context Engine: gracefully fall back to the legacy engine 当 a third-party context engine 插件 fails at resolution time (unregistered id, factory throw, 或 contract violation), preventing a full 网关 outage 在 every channel. (#66930) Thanks @openperf.
items.rawTitle: Context Engine: gracefully fall back to the legacy engine when a third-party context engine plugin fails at resolution time (unregistered id, factory throw, or contract violation), preventing a full gateway outage on every channel. (#66930) Thanks @openperf.

items.title: Control 界面/chat: keep optimistic user message cards visible 期间 active sends 通过 deferring same-session history reloads until the active run ends, including aborted 和 errored runs. (#66997) Thanks @scotthuang 和 @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Control UI/chat: keep optimistic user message cards visible during active sends by deferring same-session history reloads until the active run ends, including aborted and errored runs. (#66997) Thanks @scotthuang and @vincentkoc.

items.title: Media/Slack: 允许 host-local CSV 和 Markdown uploads only 当 the fallback buffer actually decodes as text, so real plain-text files work 不适用 letting opaque non-text blobs renamed to `.csv` 或 `.md` slip past the host-read guard. (#67047) Thanks @Unayung.
items.rawTitle: Media/Slack: allow host-local CSV and Markdown uploads only when the fallback buffer actually decodes as text, so real plain-text files work without letting opaque non-text blobs renamed to `.csv` or `.md` slip past the host-read guard. (#67047) Thanks @Unayung.

items.title: Video generation/live tests: bound provider polling 为了 live video smoke, default to the fast non-FAL text-to-video 路径, 和 use a one-second lobster prompt so release validation no longer waits indefinitely 在 slow provider queues.
items.rawTitle: Video generation/live tests: bound provider polling for live video smoke, default to the fast non-FAL text-to-video path, and use a one-second lobster prompt so release validation no longer waits indefinitely on slow provider queues.

items.rawTitle: Ollama/onboarding: split setup into `Cloud + Local`, `Cloud only`, and `Local only`, support direct `OLLAMA_API_KEY` cloud setup without a local daemon, and keep Ollama web search on the local-host path. (#67005) Thanks @obviyus.

changes.title: Control 界面/Overview: 添加 a 模型 认证 status card showing OAuth认证 令牌 health 和 provider rate-limit pressure at a glance, 使用 attention callouts 当 OAuth认证 tokens are expiring 或 expired. Backed 通过 a new `模型.authStatus` 网关 method that strips credentials 和 caches 为了 60s. (#66211) Thanks @omarshahine.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/Overview: add a Model Auth status card showing OAuth token health and provider rate-limit pressure at a glance, with attention callouts when OAuth tokens are expiring or expired. Backed by a new `models.authStatus` gateway method that strips credentials and caches for 60s. (#66211) Thanks @omarshahine.

changes.title: 内存/LanceDB: 添加 cloud storage 支持 to `内存-lancedb` so durable 内存 indexes can run 在 remote object storage 而不是 local disk only. (#63502) Thanks @rugvedS07.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/LanceDB: add cloud storage support to `memory-lancedb` so durable memory indexes can run on remote object storage instead of local disk only. (#63502) Thanks @rugvedS07.

changes.title: GitHub Copilot/内存 search: 添加 a GitHub Copilot embedding provider 为了 内存 search, 和 expose a dedicated Copilot embedding host helper so 插件 can 复用 the transport while honoring remote overrides, 令牌 refresh, 和 safer payload validation. (#61718) Thanks @feiskyer 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: GitHub Copilot/memory search: add a GitHub Copilot embedding provider for memory search, and expose a dedicated Copilot embedding host helper so plugins can reuse the transport while honoring remote overrides, token refresh, and safer payload validation. (#61718) Thanks @feiskyer and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Agent/local 模型: 添加 experimental `Agent.defaults.experimental.localModelLean: true` to drop heavyweight default tools like `浏览器`, `cron`, 和 `message`, reducing prompt size 为了 weaker local-模型 setups 不适用 changing the normal 路径. (#66495) Thanks @ImLukeF.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/local models: add experimental `agents.defaults.experimental.localModelLean: true` to drop heavyweight default tools like `browser`, `cron`, and `message`, reducing prompt size for weaker local-model setups without changing the normal path. (#66495) Thanks @ImLukeF.

changes.title: Packaging/插件: localize bundled 插件 runtime deps to their owning extensions, trim the published docs payload, 和 tighten install/package-manager guardrails so published builds stay leaner 和 core stops carrying extension-owned runtime baggage. (#67099) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Packaging/plugins: localize bundled plugin runtime deps to their owning extensions, trim the published docs payload, and tighten install/package-manager guardrails so published builds stay leaner and core stops carrying extension-owned runtime baggage. (#67099) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: QA/Matrix: split Matrix live QA 进入 a source-linked `qa-matrix` runner 和 keep repo-private `qa-*` surfaces out 的 packaged 和 published builds. (#66723) Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: QA/Matrix: split Matrix live QA into a source-linked `qa-matrix` runner and keep repo-private `qa-*` surfaces out of packaged and published builds. (#66723) Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.rawTitle: Docs/showcase: add a scannable hero, complete section jump links, and a responsive video grid for community examples. (#48493) Thanks @jchopard69.

changes.rawTitle: Security/approvals: redact secrets in exec approval prompts so inline approval review can no longer leak credential material in rendered prompt content. (#61077, #64790)

changes.rawTitle: CLI/configure: re-read the persisted config hash after writes so config updates stop failing with stale-hash races. (#64188, #66528)

changes.title: CLI/更新: prune stale packaged `dist` chunks 之后 npm upgrades 和 keep downgrade/verify inventory checks compat-safe so global upgrades 停止 failing 在 stale chunk imports. (#66959) Thanks @obviyus.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/update: prune stale packaged `dist` chunks after npm upgrades and keep downgrade/verify inventory checks compat-safe so global upgrades stop failing on stale chunk imports. (#66959) Thanks @obviyus.
